chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitution Petition No. D- 1079 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge Fresh Case. 1) For Order on CMA No. 5569/2025. 2) For hearing of main case. -------------- 11.04.2025. Petitioner Sohail Hameed, in person. -------------------- On the last date of hearing i.e. 14.03.2025, the following order was passed:- “1) Granted. 2) Granted subject to all exceptions. 3 & 4) Before notice could be ordered, learned Counsel for the Petitioner is directed to go through the Judgments reported as Firdous Trading Corporation Vs. Japan Cotton and General Trading Company Ltd. (PLD 1961 Kar. 565), Province of Sindh Vs. Haji Razzak (PLD 2017 SC 207), Rimpa Sunbeam Co- operative Housing Society Ltd. through Managing Director Vs. Karachi Metropolitan Corporation through Administrator (PLD 2006 Kar. 444), Messrs Land Mark Associates through Partner VS. Sindh Industrial Trading Estate Ltd. through Chief Executive Officer and another (2018 YLR 2143), vis-à-vis. prayer clause. He is also directed to come prepared and satisfy as to how this matter can be heard and decided by a Regular Bench as apparently, the law has been challenged vis-à-vis. Constitution of Pakistan. To come up on 11.04.2025.” Today, Counsel is not in position to assist us as to the above referred judgments and our objection. Accordingly, the instant Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution with pending application. Acting Chief Justice Judge Ayaz P.S.
